gt_sql: SELECT T3.lap, T2.name, T2.year, T1.location FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId ORDER BY T3.lap DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT r.laps AS lap, ra.name, ra.year, c.location
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON ra.circuitId = c.circuitId
ORDER BY r.laps DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the most laps f1 races had? Name the race, year and circuit location where the races with most laps was hosted.
